PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?team ?stadium WHERE {
  ?league wdt:P31 wd:Q3676783 .
  ?league wdt:P17 wd:Q9128 .
  ?league rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'third division'))
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q7943827 .
  ?team p:P527 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P527 ?league ; pq:P585 ?seasonDate ; pq:P1363 ?position .
  FILTER(?position = 3)
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonDate) = 2012)
  ?team wdt:P189 ?stadium .
}
LIMIT 1
